name_cn:
Black Size: 20 x 16 x 7.5 CM
A top-tier original factory item that luxury lovers keep repurchasing! The leather, hardware, and craftsmanship are full of authentication points! Not only is it fully original leather, but the hardware, stitching, hot stamping, and webbing are also made of the same materials and craftsmanship as the counter! High-definition, unfiltered real photos; what you see is exactly the texture you get! This Cluny mini handbag features a smooth resin LV logo for high recognition, and imported wavy calfskin is highly durable! A simple design paired with a high-density wide webbing strap, it is both formal and business-like yet retains a youthful vibe, a perfect bag that is elegant and casual!
